readings.summary: The Holy Spirit descends on Jews and Gentiles alike.

readings.citation:
Ps 98:1, 2-3, 3-4, R. see v.2b
The Lord has revealed to the nations his saving power.
readings.antiphon:
Ps 98:1, 2-3, 3-4, R. see v.2b
The Lord has revealed to the nations his saving power.

readings.summary: One without love does not know God.

Whoever loves me will keep my word, says the Lord,
and my Father will love him and we will come to him.

antiphons.text:
If you love me, keep my commandments,
says the Lord, and I will ask the Father
and he will send you another Paraclete,
to abide with you for ever, alleluia.

prelude.title: Regina Caeli / O Queen of Heaven
prelude.description: Pope Leo XIV singing Regina Caeli

gospelAcclamation.title: Easter Alleluia (Refrain)
gospelAcclamation.composer: The Lyric Gospel Acclamations • Tony Alonso
gospelAcclamation.verse:
Whoever loves me will keep my word, says the Lord,
and my Father will love him and we will come to him.
